name: Least Privilege Builder (PIM)
description: Analyzes current Entra ID role assignments, identifies permanent privileged access that should be converted to PIM just-in-time activation, and generates a migration plan. Ask me about standing role assignments, PIM adoption, or recommended activation policies.
instructions: See instructions.md for the full system prompt.

conversation_starters.text: Analyze our current role assignments and recommend a PIM migration plan
Which users have permanent Global Administrator and should be in PIM?
What activation policy should we configure for Exchange Administrators?
How many privileged users are already managed via PIM?
